name: Generate an SEO content brief from a keyword with SERP analysis and OpenAI

parameters.content:
## Generate an SEO content brief from a keyword with SERP analysis and OpenAI

## How it works

1. Receives a keyword input via a form trigger.
2. Queries the Google SERP API for search results.
3. Extracts and limits to top 10 competitor pages.
4. Fetches and analyzes competitor content to build a brief.
5. Formats and logs the SEO content brief into documents and sheets.

## Setup steps

- [ ] Set up SERP API credentials for querying Google search results.
- [ ] Configure OpenAI API credentials for generating the content brief.
- [ ] Authenticate Google Docs and Sheets access for document creation.

## Customization

Consider adjusting the output format in Google Docs or Sheets as per your specific requirements.

## Trigger and search query

Initiates the process with a keyword and queries the SERP API.

## Process SERP results

Extracts and processes top organic results.

## Fetch and analyze competitors

Fetches competitor pages and extracts heading and text content.

## Generate content brief

Analyzes data and builds an SEO content brief using AI.

## Document management

Creates and logs the SEO content brief in Google Docs and Sheets.

## Handle insufficient data

Manages workflow when not enough SERP data is available.

values.placeholder: e.g. best crm for small business

parameters.formDescription: Enter a target keyword to get a data-driven content brief built from the current top-ranking pages.

assignments.name: brief_markdown
